generated_posts.text: every major supply shock for 50 years has produced the same fork: some countries lock in more fossil fuel exposure, others accelerate out of it. the divergence this time will show up in procurement contracts, not policy statements.

selected_post.author: nickgottlieb.bsky.social
selected_post.text: Makes me a bit crazy hearing those in the western climate movement describe the energy transition as happening because solar is now the cheapest source of energy as though it's a kind of agent-less market-driven process. It's happening almost exclusively because of Chinese industrial policy!!!
